deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded April 27, 2026. Lien resolved via notary, released to Chicago Title. Post-close: gift delivery, thank you notes pending.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket to Joyce. Send thank you note to Chelsey Bongiovi.

logs.m: Closed and funded. Cash transaction complete.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo, delivered to Chicago Title.
Lien holder contacted via Fabian Cerrillo, understanding and cooperative.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acre hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. Clearing complete. First offer dead. Lead with net after close on next offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve, prepare for next offer. Lead with net price after close.

logs.m: Amendment signed, MLS updated to $117,500. Agent outreach underway.
Clearing complete. First offer dead, Michael Rodriguez RBFCU stalled.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Priority Bank foreclosure. Cleanup underway. Utilities coordinated: Medina Electric (866-632-3532), EMCSUD (830-709-3879). Listing agreement pending to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
deals.next: Get transformer number, submit electric application. Confirm water service with EMCSUD. Send listing agreement to Priority Bank.

logs.m: Floor demo complete, drywall cut for trades. Utilities confirmed. Listing paperwork needed.
Work officially starting, dumpsters deployed.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater, double-carrying. Payoff ~$493,000. Market value $350-400K. Vacant 6 months, mortgage $2,843.85/month. Three paths presented: short sale, VA assumption, or bring cash to close. Chandler laid off - short sale approval likely.
deals.next: Prepare short sale packet for Newrez. Get hardship documentation from sellers. Start short sale process.

logs.m: Call completed. Chandler laid off, strong hardship case. Leaning toward short sale.
Market analysis sent. Three options presented. Commission negotiation offered.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, relocating to NC. List price $259,900. Hairline foundation crack noted. Insurance roof claim moving forward. First showing feedback: cultural concern (feng shui), MK agent asking for pre-inspection. 4th showing scheduled May 23.
deals.next: Monitor roof situation with insurance adjuster. Follow up on additional showings and offers.

logs.m: Investor cash offer $176,300 communicated. 4th showing scheduled May 23.
MLS live, sign dropped, canvassed neighborhood. First showing feedback received.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land, development potential. Isaac interested in mobile home development (~$150K offer). Title defect found: incomplete legal description. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed. Sisters excited about development angle.
deals.next: Confirm listing extension decision. Connect Isaac with Josh LT on mobile home project. Get attorney fee estimate.

logs.m: Isaac discussed expanded 10-acre mobile home concept. Title defect being corrected.
Title defect confirmed: incomplete legal description. Attorney engaged to prepare correction deed.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: Brand new 2025 Lennar, Grace Gardens. 3BR/2BA, 1,535 sqft. Rent $1,595/month. All terms confirmed with Jimbo. Listing agreement ready to finalize. Professional photos needed. Sign drop pending.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope. Schedule professional photos. Drop sign today. Set up Zillow/HAR listings.

logs.m: All 12 listing agreement questions answered by Jimbo. Sign and marketing assets pending.
Spoke with Jimbo on road to Devine. Ready to move forward.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres, Frio County. Payoff $257K. Market value $275-315K. Sellers need minimum $285K to walk with meaning. Divorce situation. Meeting held May 15.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Schedule professional photos. Discuss pricing strategy: recommend $295K starting price.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 26. CMA pulled, net sheets built.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife
leads.detail: Active military wife, recently moved from Ohio, renting in SA. Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. VA loan eligible, zero down opportunity. Get contact info and connect with VA-approved lender.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met at 181 CR 7751 property. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold, landlord selling duplex. Pivoting to new construction with rate buydowns and incentives. No HOA requirement. Need to confirm pre-approval status and set up new construction search.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Send new construction search platform. Identify builders.

logs.m: Rental selling, rents going up. Pivoting to new construction.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon Moran connection (his mom). Looking to buy new construction, rent 2 years then occupy. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month payment. Grace Gardens preference (Lennar). Buyer rep signed May 7. Builder options being pulled.
leads.next: Builder inventory pull across multiple builders. Register as buyer agent on first visit. Confirm pre-approval status.

logs.m: Buyer rep signed. MI Homes option from Frank in play. Need to follow up on engagement.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent (Schertz/Cibolo). Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation details pending. Follow up needed to understand buyer needs and match inventory.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome. Get full details on buyer and fixer property needs.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome, details pending.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St, ~90% complete, planning to sell soon. Already working with realtor. Open to pre-market buyer opportunity. Community-first approach.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote listing to network. Stay relational.

logs.m: Met at garden event. Property ~90% complete, considering as-is sale.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her passed away, son now owns house. Previous owner was avid gardener. Son not yet contacted. Probate or inherited property opportunity. Sensitive situation, community connection angle important.
leads.next: Get son information from Miss Pat. Reach out with empathy angle. Assess if selling, renting, or keeping.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor passed, son inherited house. Gardener background.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through Little Red House. Grief to healing through plants story. Content collaboration potential with permission. Long-term trust-based real estate potential.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story for content. Keep nurturing relationship.

logs.m: Community connection. Healing through gardens story angle.

leads.title: Isaac
leads.detail: Met in person April 18. Investor interested in Schertz area. Full intake still needed to understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy (flip vs hold).
leads.next: Full Sage intake call. Understand buy box, budget, timeline. Add to Bold Trail.

logs.m: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. Full details pending.

leads.title: Kurt
leads.detail: Neighbor around Conbes area. Interested in nearby listing at 9815 Conbes (under contract $275K). Wants intel on offers. Potential seller or buyer lead pending follow-up.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Follow up to determine if buyer or seller opportunity.

logs.m: Interested in 9815 Conbes listing details. CMA and follow-up needed.

priorities.title: Milagros New Construction Buyer Path
priorities.notes: Buyer rep signed May 7. Must register as buyer agent on FIRST builder visit - critical to avoid commission loss. Pulling inventory from multiple builders to keep payments under $1,000/month with $50K down. Rate buydowns are key leverage point.

Pull new construction inventory across builders (Grace Gardens primary, also DR Horton, MI Homes)
Register as buyer agent on first model home visit
